package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for router_constructor_builds_concrete_dependencies: Router setup that creates DB clients, external clients, or repositories directly instead of receiving prebuilt dependencies.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule154NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule154NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule154NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario154Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule154NegativeService, input Rule154NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
